formula: IF(stat.max_health > 0, MIN(stat.health + stat.health_regen * DELTA(stat.turn), stat.max_health), stat.health + stat.health_regen * DELTA(stat.turn))
IF(stat.max_mana > 0, MIN(stat.mana + stat.mana_regen * DELTA(stat.turn), stat.max_mana), stat.mana + stat.mana_regen * DELTA(stat.turn))
LET(pen, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_penetration) * (1 - stat.bludgeon_penetration_base)), IF(pen > stat.bludgeon_penetration_cap, stat.bludgeon_penetration_cap, pen))
LET(pen, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_penetration) * (1 - stat.pierce_penetration_base)), IF(pen > stat.pierce_penetration_cap, stat.pierce_penetration_cap, pen))
LET(pen, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_penetration) * (1 - stat.slash_penetration_base)), IF(pen > stat.slash_penetration_cap, stat.slash_penetration_cap, pen))
LET(resist, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_resistance) * (1 - stat.bludgeon_resistance_base)), IF(resist > stat.bludgeon_resistance_cap, stat.bludgeon_resistance_cap, resist))
LET(resist, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_resistance) * (1 - stat.pierce_resistance_base)), IF(resist > stat.pierce_resistance_cap, stat.pierce_resistance_cap, resist))
LET(resist, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_resistance) * (1 - stat.slash_resistance_base)), IF(resist > stat.slash_resistance_cap, stat.slash_resistance_cap, resist))
